name: @stock-buddy/mcp-server
description: Stock Buddy DSE analysis — TypeScript monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build -w @stock-buddy/core && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/skills && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/mcp-server && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/data-adapter && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/agents && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/prediction && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/ui && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/scraper
scripts.build:docker: npm run build -w @stock-buddy/core && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/skills && npm run build -w @stock-buddy/mcp-server

author: Stock Buddy Team
